endpoints.request_shape: {email?: string, password?: string, patient_id?: string, otp?: string}
endpoints.response_shape: {token: string, user_id: string, role: string, session_id: string, expires_at: string}
endpoints.description: Authenticate a patient with email and password, or a doctor with patient ID and 6-digit OTP; return JWT and session metadata.

endpoints.request_shape: {email: string, password: string, first_name: string, last_name: string, language: string}
endpoints.response_shape: {user_id: string, token: string, email: string}
endpoints.description: Register a new patient with email, password, name, and language preference; return user ID and login token.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean}
endpoints.description: Invalidate the current session token and log the logout event.

endpoints.response_shape: {user_id: string, email: string, first_name: string, last_name: string, language: string, created_at: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the authenticated patient's profile including language preference and contact details.

endpoints.request_shape: Partial<{first_name: string, last_name: string, language: string, phone: string}>
endpoints.response_shape: {user_id: string, email: string, first_name: string, last_name: string, language: string}
endpoints.description: Update the authenticated patient's profile fields such as language preference or contact information.

endpoints.response_shape: {documents: [{id: string, title: string, document_type: string, status: string, created_at: string, author_id: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all medical documents uploaded by the authenticated patient, sorted by creation date descending.

endpoints.request_shape: FormData: {file: File, document_type: string, title?: string}
endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, title: string, document_type: string, status: string, created_at: string}
endpoints.description: Upload a new medical document (prescription, report, summary) as multipart form data; trigger AI extraction pipeline.

endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, title: string, document_type: string, status: string, content: string, created_at: string, author_id: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a single document with its full content and extraction status.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, deleted_id: string}
endpoints.description: Delete a document and all associated extracted facts; log the deletion action.

endpoints.response_shape: {facts: [{id: string, content: string, fact_type: string, confidence_score: float, source_document_id: string, quoted_snippet: string, extraction_method: string, created_at: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all extracted facts from the patient's documents with source traceability; filter by fact_type or confidence_score.

endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, content: string, fact_type: string, confidence_score: float, source_document_id: string, quoted_snippet: string, extraction_method: string, created_at: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a single extracted fact with its full source document reference and quoted snippet.

endpoints.response_shape: {medications: [{id: string, drug_name: string, rxcui: string, dose: string, frequency: string, start_date: string, end_date: string, prescriber: string, created_at: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all medications extracted from the patient's documents, normalized by RxCUI with dose and date ranges.

endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, drug_name: string, rxcui: string, dose: string, frequency: string, start_date: string, end_date: string, prescriber: string, source_document_id: string, created_at: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a single medication record with prescriber details and source document reference.

endpoints.response_shape: {appointments: [{id: string, doctor_id: string, doctor_name: string, appointment_date: string, status: string, follow_up_due_date: string, created_at: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all appointments (scheduled, completed, missed) with follow-up due dates and doctor information.

endpoints.request_shape: {doctor_id: string, appointment_date: string, reason: string, follow_up_due_date?: string}
endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, doctor_id: string, appointment_date: string, status: string, created_at: string}
endpoints.description: Create a new appointment record with scheduled date and doctor assignment.

endpoints.request_shape: Partial<{status: string, appointment_date: string, follow_up_due_date: string}>
endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, status: string, appointment_date: string, follow_up_due_date: string}
endpoints.description: Update appointment status (completed, missed, rescheduled) and follow-up due date.

endpoints.response_shape: {flags: [{id: string, key: string, description: string, severity: string, triggered_by_facts: string[], created_at: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all detected care gaps and conflicts: duplicate medications, drug interactions, missed follow-ups, with severity and triggering facts.

endpoints.response_shape: {nodes: [{id: string, label: string, type: string, data: object}], edges: [{source: string, target: string, label: string, type: string}]}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the patient's full knowledge graph as nodes (visits, doctors, medications, conditions, tests) and edges (prescriptions, follow-ups); format as JSON for visualization.

endpoints.response_shape: {otp: string, expires_at: string, doctor_email: string}
endpoints.description: Generate a 6-digit OTP for a doctor to access this patient's record; OTP expires in 30 minutes and is single-use.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, revoked_session_id: string}
endpoints.description: Revoke an active OTP session immediately, terminating the doctor's access.

endpoints.response_shape: {logs: [{id: string, user_id: string, doctor_name: string, resource: string, action: string, timestamp: string, session_duration_minutes: int, ip_address: string, user_agent: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all access events to this patient's record: doctor, timestamp, session duration, IP address, user agent; sorted by recency.

endpoints.response_shape: {term: string, explanation: string, language: string, source: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve plain-language explanations of prescriptions and medical terms in the patient's chosen language; powered by Bhashini or LLM fallback.

endpoints.response_shape: {recommendations: [{specialist: string, department: string, confidence_score: float, reasoning: string, disclaimer: string}]}
endpoints.description: Generate specialist or department recommendations based on symptoms and medical history; include confidence score and non-actionable disclaimer.

endpoints.response_shape: {facilities: [{id: string, name: string, type: string, latitude: float, longitude: float, address: string, phone: string, distance_km: float}]}
endpoints.description: Locate nearby diagnostic centers, pharmacies, and emergency facilities using Overpass/OpenStreetMap and Leaflet; return map coordinates and contact info.

endpoints.response_shape: {summary: string, claims: [{text: string, source_document_id: string, quoted_snippet: string, confidence_score: float}], generated_at: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the AI-generated clinical summary for a patient (doctor must have active OTP session); each claim is linked to source document and quoted snippet.

endpoints.response_shape: {timeline: [{date: string, event_type: string, description: string, source_document_id: string}]}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the patient's full longitudinal timeline (visits, medications, tests, treatments) for doctor review during active OTP session.

endpoints.response_shape: {nodes: [{id: string, label: string, type: string, data: object}], edges: [{source: string, target: string, label: string, type: string}]}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the patient's knowledge graph (nodes and edges) for doctor visualization during active OTP session.

endpoints.response_shape: {flags: [{id: string, key: string, description: string, severity: string, triggered_by_facts: string[]}]}
endpoints.description: Retrieve all detected flags (duplicate medications, drug interactions, missed follow-ups) for the patient during active OTP session.

endpoints.response_shape: {missed_followup_rate: float, medication_adherence_rate: float, appointment_completion_rate: float, total_patients: int, period: string}
endpoints.description: Retrieve hospital-level compliance metrics (anonymized): missed follow-up rates, medication adherence, appointment completion rates; aggregated by cohort.

endpoints.response_shape: {bottlenecks: [{alert_type: string, metric_value: float, threshold: float, affected_cohort_size: int, severity: string}]}
endpoints.description: Retrieve appointment bottleneck alerts (anonymized): >20% missed follow-ups, >30-day appointment delays; surface as KPI cards with drill-down capability.

endpoints.response_shape: {condition: string, avg_days_to_treatment: float, avg_days_to_followup: float, sample_size: int}
endpoints.description: Retrieve average treatment timelines (anonymized): time from diagnosis to treatment initiation, time to follow-up completion; aggregated by condition.

endpoints.response_shape: {cohort_id: string, metric: string, breakdown: [{segment: string, value: float, record_count: int}], audit_trail: [{action: string, timestamp: string, user_id: string}]}
endpoints.description: Drill down from an aggregated metric to cohort-level breakdowns (anonymized); clicking further reveals individual records with full audit trail.

endpoints.response_shape: {flags: [{id: string, key: string, description: string, severity: string, affected_patient_count: int, created_at: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all system-wide flags (duplicate medications, drug interactions, missed follow-ups) aggregated and anonymized; no individual patient names exposed.

endpoints.response_shape: {interactions: [{id: string, drug_a_id: string, drug_b_id: string, drug_a_name: string, drug_b_name: string, interaction_type: string, severity: string, description: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all known drug interaction pairs loaded from DDInter; queryable locally for offline conflict detection.

endpoints.response_shape: {flags: [{id: string, key: string, enabled: boolean, description: string, environment: string, updated_at: string}], total: int}
endpoints.description: List all feature flags (enabled/disabled) with environment and description; used to control feature rollout and A/B testing.

endpoints.response_shape: {id: string, key: string, enabled: boolean, description: string, updated_at: string}
endpoints.description: Update a feature flag's enabled status and description; log the change for audit purposes.

endpoints.response_shape: {file_id: string, filename: string, size_bytes: int, mime_type: string, storage_path: string}
endpoints.description: Generic file upload endpoint for documents; returns file ID and storage path for subsequent processing.

endpoints.request_shape: {patient_id: string, title: string, message: string, notification_type: string}
endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, notification_id: string, sent_at: string}
endpoints.description: Send a push notification to a patient via ntfy.sh; used for medication reminders, appointment alerts, and follow-up due dates.

endpoints.response_shape: {address: string, latitude: float, longitude: float}
endpoints.description: Geocode an address to latitude/longitude using Leaflet; used for facility locator.

endpoints.response_shape: {distance_km: float, duration_minutes: int, route: [{latitude: float, longitude: float}]}
endpoints.description: Calculate route between two coordinates using Leaflet; returns distance and estimated travel time.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, processed_facts: int}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for OpenAI async extraction results; processes completed document extractions and updates fact store.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for Bhashini translation results; updates multilingual explanations for medical terms.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for ntfy.sh push notification delivery status; logs notification events.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for Leaflet geocoding and routing results; updates facility locator cache.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, facilities_indexed: int}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for Overpass API facility query results; updates nearby pharmacies, labs, and emergency facilities.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, patients_created: int, documents_created: int}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for Synthea synthetic patient data; seeds the database with demo patients and documents.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for RxNorm drug normalization results; updates medication records with normalized RxCUI.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, interactions_indexed: int}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for DDInter drug interaction data; updates the local interaction table for offline conflict detection.

endpoints.response_shape: {success: boolean, events_indexed: int}
endpoints.description: Inbound webhook receiver for openFDA adverse event data; enriches medication safety information.
